data.title: In 2025, countries possess 463,000 BTC, with US and China at the forefront. Bhutan, Iran, and the UK also hold growing reserves.
data.description: As of 2025, governments worldwide collectively possess more than 463,000 bitcoins, indicating a significant increase in their hold on the digital asset. The United States and China are notably at the forefront in terms of bitcoin holdings, showcasing their interest and involvement in this emerging sector. Moreover, countries such as Bhutan, Iran, and the United Kingdom are observed to be discreetly establishing strategic reserves of bitcoins, signifying a growing trend towards diversifying and strengthening financial portfolios.

data.title: DayOne and Gaw Capital start construction on Tokyo data center campus; global developer and investor collaborate.
data.description: In Tokyo on August 1, 2025, global data center developer and operator DayOne, headquartered in Singapore, along with multi-asset investment management firm Gaw Capital Partners, began construction on a new project. DayOne, known for its expertise in data centers, partnered with Gaw Capital Partners, an investment firm specializing in real estate, growth equity, private credit, and infrastructure markets worldwide. The event marked the official start of the development, showcasing the collaboration between the two companies.

data.title: Statkraft sells Enerfín Canada to Atlantica Sustainable Infrastructure, includes wind farms, team, and development portfolio.
data.description: In Montreal, Canada, and Oslo, Norway, Statkraft recently finalized a deal to offload Enerfín Canada, its Canadian renewable energy portfolio, to Atlantica Sustainable Infrastructure Ltd. The sale encompasses the transfer of the Enerfín Canada team, operational wind farms, and a selection of projects in development.

data.title: Zoe Energy Storage maintains BNEF Tier 1 ranking in Q3 2025. Accelerates global green transition with one-stop services.
data.description: Global services that facilitate the transition to green energy are gaining momentum worldwide. On August 1, 2025, BloombergNEF (BNEF), a leading authority in clean energy research, unveiled its Energy Storage Tier 1 List for Q3 2025. Zoe Energy Storage has solidified its place on the list, showcasing the growing significance of sustainable solutions. This development exemplifies the importance of advancing green technologies, with significant implications for the industry.

data.title: Planet Classroom debuts 9 new films showcasing youth creativity and global impact by rising filmmakers.
data.description: Celebrated short films highlighting the work of talented young filmmakers making a difference through storytelling tackle diverse topics, including immersive education, environmental solutions, and navigating relationships during lockdown. These films are featured on the Planet Classroom Network, a worldwide hub for youth-created content focused on storytelling, creativity, and driving positive change.

data.title: Trividia Health UK launches TRUEplus 5-Bevel Pen Needles in UK, offering variety of needle gauges and sizes at low cost for diabetes patients.
data.description: Trividia Health UK Limited in conjunction with London and Ft. Lauderdale, Florida has unveiled the launch of TRUEplus 5-Bevel Pen Needles in the United Kingdom. This latest addition to the market offers a diverse range of needle gauges and sizes for patients with diabetes, at an affordable price point. The TRUEplus 5-Bevel Pen Needles prioritize comfort, safety, and usability, catering to the unique needs of individuals managing diabetes. Available in multiple variations, this new product aims to enhance the treatment experience for patients and facilitate healthcare providers in delivering top-notch care.

data.title: Yutong bus impresses in Ghana with reliability, fuel-efficiency, and comfort. Van showcased its capabilities in real-world road challenge. (Character count: 124)
data.description: In August 2025 in Accra, Ghana, the commercial vehicle manufacturer, Yutong Bus (SHA: 600066), showcased the impressive proficiency of its Yutong Van. The demonstration highlighted the van's skill as a "professional van that excels in operation" during a challenging real-world road test.

data.title: UAB "Atsinaujinančios energetikos investicijos" releases Q2 2025 factsheet with investment details, key events, strategy, and financials.
data.description: The company "UAB Atsinaujinančios Energetikos Investicijos" has released its latest factsheet detailing its investment portfolio, key events, business strategy, operating segments, and financial indicators as of June 30, 2025. This report offers a comprehensive overview of the company's performance and status as of the specified date.

data.title: First Mold will participate in Meximold 2025 with cost-effective solutions for the automotive industry.
data.description: In Zhongshan, China, on July 31, 2025, First Mold, a leading precision mold and injection molding manufacturer, revealed its plans to take part in Meximold 2025. The event will be held at Mexico's Querétaro Exhibition Center, where First Mold will be located at Booth #905. This exhibition is scheduled for October. Earlier, the company also participated in North America's PTXPO.
